children.text: In the past, the way people travelled was very different from today.
children.cn: 在过去，人们出行的这种方式与今天非常不同。
children.notes: the way: 方式；travelled: 旅行（travel的过去式）
children.statement: travelled 是 travel 的英式拼写过去式。

children.text: Most people simply walked or rode bicycles to get around.
children.cn: 大多数人仅仅是通过走路或骑自行车来四处走动。
children.notes: simply: 仅仅；get around: 四处走动
children.statement: rode 是 ride 的过去式。

children.text: Nowadays, we have many modern options like high-speed trains and subways.
children.cn: 如今，我们有很多现代化的选择，比如高铁和地铁。
children.notes: nowadays: 如今；modern: 现代的；high-speed train: 高铁
children.statement: high-speed 是形容词，意为“高速的”。

children.text: They are fast and help us travel far in a short time.
children.cn: 它们很快，能帮我们在短时间内去很远的地方。
children.notes: in a short time: 在短时间内
children.statement: They 指代 trains and subways。

children.text: I think these changes are amazing because they make our lives much easier.
children.cn: 我认为这些变化很惊人，因为它们让我们的生活变得容易得多。
children.notes: amazing: 惊人的；much easier: 容易得多
children.statement: much easier 中 much 修饰比较级 easier。

children.text: Although life is different now, I still enjoy walking with my family for fun.
children.cn: 虽然现在生活不同了，但我仍然喜欢和家人一起散步寻找乐趣。
children.notes: although: 虽然；for fun: 为了好玩
children.statement: although 引导的从句不能再加 but。
